text: In the first image, the emptiness and the dimly lit corridor envelop me in a quiet sense of anticipation, as if the silence is waiting to be broken by an event or discovery. The angled perspective makes me feel disoriented, not quite grounded, aware of my own presence in a place designed for function and order. In the second image, the glow of screens and bold design spark curiosity and reflection. Words and images compete for my attention and invite me to question the relationship between humans and innovation. I feel stimulated, intellectually alert, yet aware of the constructed nature of this space—like an actor stepping onto a stage of intentional ideas. I am both participant and observer.
